headline.purpose: Section headings (Testimonials, Thoughts, Let's talk, Featured Projects).

shadows.name: active-indicator
shadows.purpose: Subtle indicators for active pill-based navigation.

components.name: Navigation Pill
components.description: Floating black pill navigation centered at the top of the viewport.
components.html: Aman
components.css: .ds-nav-pill { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 8px 10px 8px 24px; background: #121212; color: #fff; border-radius: 9999px; width: 280px; font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-logo { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-menu-btn { width: 40px; height: 28px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #fff; border: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #121212; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-menu-btn:hover { background: #f4f3ef; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Bold sand-colored button used for form submits and navigation quick-links.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { width: 100%; padding: 14px; background: #eae9e4; color: #121212; font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f4f3ef; transform: translateY(-1px); }

narrative.overview: A visual framework structured around heavy, high-contrast grotesque typography (Archivo), centered layouts, and tactile warm paper textures combined with scrolltelling animations and 3D assets.
keyCharacteristics: Archivo typography utilized sitewide in bold/black weights.
Bespoke 3D glossy assets stationary relative to text columns.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Text colors must maintain a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1. Muted gray body text is prohibited.

rules.name: The Two-Line Cap Rule
rules.body: Hero display headers are capped at exactly two lines using whitespace-nowrap.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Dropshadows are prohibited except for small active hover states.

dos: Do position 3D decorative assets relative to static max-w-5xl containers.
Do stabilize heights on dynamic typewriter elements using zero-width spaces.
donts: Don't use soft wide drop shadows on buttons and cards.
Don't wrap the display typewriter lines into a third line.
